title: Enna Solla Lyrics Thanga Magan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Thanga Magan Enna Solla Lyrics 
English Meaning/Translation
The New life of Tamizh
Singer: Shweta Mohan
Lyrics: Dhanush

Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Enna solla
yedhu solla
kannodu kan pesa
vaartha illa

ennennavo ullukulla
vella sollaama
en vekkam thalla

chinna chinna aasa
ulla thikki thikki pesa.
malligapo vaasam
konjam kathoda veesa.

Uthu uthu paarkka
nenjil muthu muththaa verkka.
putham pudhu vazhka
yenna unnodu serka.

ennodu nee unnodu naan
onrodu naam ondraagum naal
ennodu nee unnodu naan
ondraagum naal. (2)

Sollaamal kollaamal
nenjodu kadhal sera
nenjodu kaadhal sera
moochu mutthudhey.

innaalum ennaalum
kai korthu pogum paadhai
kai korthu pogum paadhai
kannil thondrudhey

sollaadha ennangal
pollaadha aasaigal
unnale serudhey
baaram koodudhey.

thedaadha thedalgal
kaanaadha kaatchigal
unnodu kaanbadhil
neram pogudhey.

chinna chinna aasa
ulla thikki thikki pesa.
malligapo vaasam konjam
kathoda veesa.

Uthu uthu paarkka
nenjil muthu muththaa verkka.
putham pudhu vazhka
yenna unnodu serka.

ennodu nee unnodu naan
onrodu naam ondraagum naal
ennodu nee unnodu naan
ondraagum naal. (2)

Enna solla
yedhu solla
kannodu kan pesa
vaartha illa

ennennavo ullukulla
vella sollaama
en vekkam thalla		 English Meaning
I tried my best :)
what to say
what more to say
no words to speak
when eyes meet

many words inside
but my shame stops me
to tell others.

little little desires
stutter inside.
scent of jasmine,
smells in air.

a deep look,
makes to sweat inside.
a new life
adds me with you.

you’re with me, I’m with you
this is the day we join as one.
you’re with me, I’m with you
this is the day.

without telling
love gets into heart.
while love gets into heart
am breathless.

today and forever
the path we go together
I could see
the path we would go together.

untold thoughts,
wicked desires,
both joins coz of you
and increases the burden.

unsearched searches
unseen views
on seeing with you
moves the time fast

little little desires
stutter inside.
scent of jasmine,
smells in air.

a deep look,
makes to sweat inside.
a new life
adds me with you.

you’re with me, I’m with you
this is the day we join as one.
you’re with me, I’m with you
this is the day.

 what to say
what to say
no words to speak
when eyes meet

many words inside
but shame stops me
to tell others.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Enna Solla'?

The song 'Enna Solla' expresses feelings of love and the complexities of communication in a relationship, highlighting the emotional turmoil of the protagonist.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Thanga Magan'?

In 'Thanga Magan', this song reflects the protagonist's inner thoughts and feelings towards his love interest, showcasing the romantic tension in the storyline.

Who is the singer of 'Enna Solla'?

The song is sung by Shweta Mohan, known for her melodious voice and emotional delivery.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics for 'Enna Solla' were penned by Dhanush, who is also the lead actor in the movie.

When was 'Enna Solla' released?

'Enna Solla' was released on November 25, 2015, as part of the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Enna Solla', the protagonist grapples with his feelings of love and the challenges of expressing them. The song beautifully encapsulates the emotions of longing and vulnerability, making it a poignant moment in the film. With Shweta Mohan's enchanting vocals and Dhanush's heartfelt lyrics, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. It serves as a reminder of the complexities of love and the desire for connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enna Solla from Thanga Magan is a beautifully crafted melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Shweta Mohan's soulful voice combined with Dhanush's poignant lyrics creates an emotional experience that resonates deeply with listeners. This song is a perfect blend of romance and melancholy, making it a must-listen for anyone who appreciates heartfelt music.
